name: proscenium-playwright-tests
description: Playwright E2E Framework for Proscenium V2

scripts.test:bvt: npm run clean:allure && playwright test --grep @bvt --project=bvt && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.test:regression: npm run clean:allure && playwright test --grep @regression --project=regression-chromium --project=regression-firefox && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.test: npm run clean:allure && playwright test && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
